headlines.title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
headlines.summary: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.

headlines.title: South Carolina governor taps Lindsey Graham's sister to serve as interim senator
headlines.summary: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.

headlines.title: Judge says Trump sued IRS for 'improper purpose'; refers his lawyer to bar
headlines.summary: Trump's lawsuit against the IRS was settled by the Justice Department with an agreement to create a $1.8 billion "lawfare" fund that has since been scrapped.

headlines.title: Trump to claim declassified intel reveals 2020 election interference: MS NOW
headlines.summary: Trump said he will make a "Speech to the Nation on Thursday evening, at 9 P.M. Eastern," without providing further details.

headlines.title: Chipotle is opening its first restaurant in Mexico
headlines.summary: Fast casual chain Chipotle announced Monday that it is opening its first location in Mexico in the Monterrey area.

headlines.title: UN maritime agency opposes Hormuz transit fees after Trump demands protection money
headlines.summary: The security situation in Hormuz has deteriorated since Iran attacked multiple commercial ships transiting the strait over the past week.

headlines.title: Oil volatility is creating a 'win-win' trade strategy
headlines.summary: The United States Oil Fund (USO), the ETF that best tracks oil prices, offers equity options traders a liquid, accessible alternative to the complexities of the futures market.

headlines.title: Traders are betting on a comeback quarter for Netflix
headlines.summary: Options traders are striking a decidedly bullish tone heading into the streaming giant's earnings on Thursday.

headlines.title: Kalshi launches 'Pro' product for users trading multiple markets at same time, perpetual futures
headlines.summary: The platform is designed to alleviate problems the company's most active traders have run into, according to a memo provided to CNBC.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are confident about these 3 stocks for the long haul
headlines.summary: Those looking for attractive stock picks amid the ongoing volatility can gain key insights by tracking the recommendations of top Wall Street analysts.

headlines.title: Berkshire Hathaway gains ground, but still trails the S&P 500 as '26 enters second half
headlines.summary: With 2026 a bit more than half over, Berkshire Hathaway's B shares are down 1.8% year-to-date and 12.4 percentage points behind the S&P 500's 10.7% gain.

headlines.title: Traders fall back in love with Meta. Here's where bulls see it going
headlines.summary: Meta Platform's AI efforts are looking like the recipe for a comeback after an almost year-long drought in shares of the $1.7 trillion market-cap company.

headlines.title: The U.S. is maxing out its strategic oil reserves as Trump vows to control the Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Strategic Petroleum Reserve stockpiles are precariously low and have been hit by major equipment failures, leaks and spills, according to a government report.

headlines.title: Why a borrowing binge by investors is a warning sign for the stock market
headlines.summary: Investors are increasingly borrowing to buy stocks, a reflection of greed in the stock market as they seek to amplify returns with margin debt. The growing pile of borrowed money has some on Wall Street nervous.

headlines.title: SpaceX’s stock threatens to fall below the IPO price. Do investors face a ‘crisis’ if it does?
headlines.summary: The company has shed more than $800 billion in market value from its $2.67 trillion peak in less than a month.

headlines.title: Sandisk’s stock is plunging, but some analysts are getting even more bullish
headlines.summary: One new stock-price target implies nearly 85% upside from current levels.

headlines.title: Lindsey Graham died from a rare heart condition. Here’s how to know if you’re at risk.
headlines.summary: Aortic dissections are extremely rare; however, people with a family history or who have been diagnosed with certain genetic syndromes have an elevated risk

headlines.title: You don’t have to be rich to be financially independent. Here’s how to take control of your money.
headlines.summary: Relying on a high salary or a hot stock is a dangerous trap. Why the most secure people plan for sudden crisis.

candidates.thesis: Leader in AI and compute infrastructure, benefiting from secular growth in high-performance computing and AI workloads. Strong technical setup with price above SMA50 and SMA200, and RSI at a healthy level.

Critical supplier of EUV lithography equipment, essential for advanced semiconductor manufacturing. Positioned to benefit from the long-term growth in semiconductor demand. RSI is neutral, and price is slightly above SMA50.

Leader in cybersecurity with strong growth in cloud security and subscription-based revenue. Benefiting from increasing enterprise cybersecurity spending. RSI is healthy, and price is above SMA50 and SMA200.

Cloud-native cybersecurity leader with strong growth in endpoint protection and subscription-based revenue. Positioned to benefit from the increasing importance of cybersecurity globally. RSI is healthy, and price is above SMA50 and SMA200.
Key player in the clean energy sector, with exposure to small modular reactors and renewable energy infrastructure. RSI is neutral, and price is near SMA50, providing a reasonable entry point.
